hero.title: Packers & Movers in Amritsar
hero.subtitle: Ranjit Avenue to Green Avenue, old city to Civil Lines — 360+ verified movers in Amritsar.

intro: Amritsar blends old-city dense lanes near the Golden Temple with newer residential colonies like Ranjit Avenue, Green Avenue, and Friends Colony. Radhe packers and movers's 360+ verified vendors handle both contexts — narrow gali moves and high-rise society relocations with equal ease.
whyUs: Old Amritsar's narrow streets need smaller vehicles and experienced loaders. Our vendors carry the right-sized fleet and are familiar with entry restrictions near the Golden Temple precinct and Walled City.

faqs.q: Can you move items from narrow old-city lanes?
faqs.a: Yes. We use smaller vehicles like Tata Ace and Bolero Pickup for narrow gali access.

faqs.q: What is the typical cost in Amritsar?
Do you operate to Chandigarh and Delhi?
faqs.a: Yes, inter-city moves with full insurance are available.
